case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION VS YVETTE GAVIRIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,422.12 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT YVETTE GAVIRIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YVETTE GAVIRIA
